message.content:
Create FIVE files for the "Buy Property Services" Shopify Dawn theme fork. This is a UK property services marketplace.

---

**FILE 1: C:/Users/colby/buy-property-services/assets/buy-property.js**

Custom JavaScript for the theme:

1. **Scroll Reveal Animation**: IntersectionObserver that watches `.reveal-on-scroll` elements and adds `.revealed` class when they enter viewport (threshold 0.1). Should handle elements already in viewport on page load.

2. **Header Scroll Effect**: On scroll past 50px, add `.header--scrolled` class to the header element (`.section-header`). Remove when scrolled back to top.

3. **Selling/Renting Toggle**: Handle click on `.hero-toggle-btn` buttons - add `.active` class to clicked button, remove from sibling. Could show/hide different service categories later.

4. **Smooth Scroll**: For any anchor links starting with `#`, smooth scroll to target.

5. **Mobile Bottom Sheet Cart**: Simple bottom-sheet behavior for `.cart-bottom-sheet` - slide up on open, slide down on close.

6. **Service Card Hover**: Add subtle parallax tilt effect on desktop for `.glass-card` elements on mousemove (very subtle, max 2-3 degrees).

Wrap everything in a DOMContentLoaded listener. Use vanilla JS only (no jQuery). Include comments explaining each section. Use requestAnimationFrame for scroll handlers.

---

**FILE 2: C:/Users/colby/buy-property-services/snippets/card-service.liquid**

A reusable service card snippet that accepts these variables:
- `card_title` - Service name
- `card_description` - Short description
- `card_price` - Price text (e.g., "From £299")
- `card_icon` - Icon name string
- `card_link` - URL to link to
- `card_color_scheme` - Color scheme class

The card should render:
- A glassmorphism card (`.glass-card .card-service`)
- Icon area at top (use a simple placeholder div with the icon name)
- Title in h3
- Description paragraph
- Price badge
- "Learn More" link/button
- The whole card is clickable (wrapped in anchor)
- Hover animation classes

---

**FILE 3: C:/Users/colby/buy-property-services/snippets/icon-service.liquid**

A snippet that renders inline SVG icons based on a `icon_name` variable. Support these icons:
- `document` - For Auction Legal Pack (a document/paper icon)
- `house-search` - For RICS Survey (house with magnifying glass)
- `coins` - For Outlays (stack of coins)
- `camera` - For Photography (camera icon)
- `scroll` - For Property Title (scroll/certificate)
- `arrow-up` - For Rent Increase (upward arrow with pound sign)
- `handshake` - For Tenancy Agreement (handshake)
- `megaphone` - For Portal Boosting (megaphone)
- `check-circle` - Generic checkmark circle
- `star` - Star for ratings

Each SVG should be 40x40, use `currentColor` for fill/stroke, and be clean/minimal line-art style. Use a Liquid case statement to select the icon.

---

**FILE 4: C:/Users/colby/buy-property-services/templates/product.service.json**

A Shopify JSON template for service product pages. This template will be assigned to all 8 property services. Structure:

```json
{
  "sections": {
    "main": {
      "type": "main-product",
      "blocks": {
        "title": { "type": "title" },
        "price": { "type": "price" },
        "description": { "type": "description" },
        "quantity_selector": { "type": "quantity_selector" },
        "buy_buttons": { "type": "buy_buttons" }
      },
      "block_order": ["title", "price", "description", "quantity_selector", "buy_buttons"],
      "settings": {
        "enable_sticky_info": true,
        "color_scheme": "scheme-1",
        "media_size": "medium",
        "media_fit": "contain",
        "gallery_layout": "stacked",
        "hide_variants": false,
        "enable_video_looping": false,
        "padding_top": 36,
        "padding_bottom": 12
      }
    },
    "process_timeline": {
      "type": "process-timeline",
      "settings": {
        "heading": "How This Service Works",
        "padding_top": 36,
        "padding_bottom": 36
      }
    },
    "related_services": {
      "type": "featured-collection",
      "settings": {
        "title": "Related Services",
        "heading_size": "h2",
        "products_to_show": 4,
        "columns_desktop": 4,
        "color_scheme": "scheme-1",
        "image_ratio": "square",
        "show_secondary_image": false,
        "show_vendor": false,
        "show_rating": false,
        "columns_mobile": "2",
        "padding_top": 36,
        "padding_bottom": 36
      }
    }
  },
  "order": ["main", "process_timeline", "related_services"]
}
```

---

**FILE 5: C:/Users/colby/buy-property-services/sections/main-service-product.liquid**

A custom main product section specifically for services (NOT physical goods). Based on Dawn's main-product.liquid but simplified:

- Remove all shipping/weight/variant-heavy logic
- Keep: product title, price display, description, buy button
- Add: "What's Included" collapsible accordion
- Add: "Timescales" collapsible accordion  
- Add: "Important Information" note that says "Our team will contact you within 24 hours of purchase to begin processing your service."
- Add: Property address text input field (with label "Property Address") that gets added as a line item property
- Style the buy button as the orange CTA (.btn-primary)
- Include the sticky bottom CTA on mobile
- Keep Shopify's product form functionality intact for cart/checkout to work

Schema should support blocks for: title, price, description, buy_buttons, collapsible_tab (with heading and content settings), property_address_input.

Make sure the product form uses proper Shopify Liquid (product form tag, variant selector if needed, add to cart). The property address should be captured as a cart line item property so it appears in the order.

Write all 5 files with complete, production-ready code.

content.text: I'll read the memory files first to get the project details, then create all five files.

content.content:
1→---
     2→name: Buy Property Services Shopify Theme
     3→description: Full Shopify Dawn-forked theme for UK property services marketplace - 8 services, manual fulfillment, green/earth color palette
     4→type: project
     5→---
     6→
     7→Building a Shopify Online Store 2.0 theme forked from Dawn for "Buy Property Services" - a UK property services marketplace.
     8→
     9→**Services:** Auction Legal Pack, RICS Level 2 Survey, Outlays, Professional Photography, Property Title, Rent Increase, Tenancy Agreement, Portal Boosting.
    10→
    11→**Color palette (from mockup):** Dark forest green, orange/amber accents, olive/lime green, cream/beige backgrounds. NOT the dark navy/cyan from the Gemini PRD.
    12→
    13→**Key constraints:**
    14→- Manual fulfillment only (no automated delivery)
    15→- No progress bar for Auction Pack
    16→- No date picker for RICS Survey ("team contacts within 24h")
    17→- Mobile-first, thumb-friendly
    18→- Scroll-reveal animations, glassmorphism-style cards
    19→
    20→**Why:** User is a beginner building this as a property services business. Code goes to GitHub for Shopify to pull.
    21→
    22→**How to apply:** Build with clean, well-commented Liquid code. Prioritize simplicity and teachability. Follow Dawn patterns closely for maintainability.
    23→

1→---
     2→name: Colby - beginner Shopify developer
     3→description: Beginner developer building a property services Shopify site, needs guidance alongside code
     4→type: user
     5→---
     6→
     7→Colby is a beginner to Shopify/Liquid development. Building a UK property services business. Uses Gemini for PRD planning and Claude for implementation. Needs well-commented, approachable code and step-by-step guidance.
     8→

content.content:
1→{% comment %} 2→ Renders product buy-buttons. 3→ Accepts: 4→ - product: {Object} product object. 5→ - block: {Object} passing the block information. 6→ - product_form_id: {String} product form id. 7→ - section_id: {String} id of section to which this snippet belongs. 8→ - show_pickup_availability: {Boolean} for the pickup availability. If true the pickup availability is rendered, false - not rendered (optional). 9→ 10→ Usage: 11→ {% render 'buy-buttons', block: block, product: product, product_form_id: product_form_id, section_id: section.id, show_pickup_availability: true %} 12→{% endcomment %} 13→
14→ {%- if product != blank -%} 15→ {%- liquid 16→ assign gift_card_recipient_feature_active = false 17→ if block.settings.show_gift_card_recipient and product.gift_card? 18→ assign gift_card_recipient_feature_active = true 19→ endif 20→ 21→ assign show_dynamic_checkout = false 22→ if block.settings.show_dynamic_checkout and gift_card_recipient_feature_active == false 23→ assign show_dynamic_checkout = true 24→ endif 25→ -%} 26→ 27→ 32→
33→ 34→ {{- 'icon-error.svg' | inline_asset_content -}} 35→ 36→ 37→
38→ 39→ {%- form 'product', 40→ product, 41→ id: product_form_id, 42→ class: 'form', 43→ novalidate: 'novalidate', 44→ data-type: 'add-to-cart-form' 45→ -%} 46→ 58→ 59→ {%- if gift_card_recipient_feature_active -%} 60→ {%- render 'gift-card-recipient-form', product: product, form: form, section: section -%}

input.content:
{% comment %} Renders a service card with glassmorphism styling. Accepts: - card_title: {String} Service name (e.g. "RICS Level 2 Survey") - card_description: {String} Short description of the service - card_price: {String} Price text (e.g. "From £299") - card_icon: {String} Icon name to pass to icon-service snippet - card_link: {String} URL the card links to - card_color_scheme: {String} Color scheme class (e.g. "scheme-1") Usage: {% render 'card-service', card_title: 'Auction Legal Pack', card_description: 'Everything you need for auction.', card_price: 'From £299', card_icon: 'document', card_link: product.url, card_color_scheme: 'scheme-1' %} {% endcomment %} {%- liquid assign title = card_title | default: 'Service' assign description = card_description | default: '' assign price = card_price | default: '' assign icon = card_icon | default: 'check-circle' assign link = card_link | default: '#' assign color_scheme = card_color_scheme | default: 'scheme-1' -%} {%- comment -%} Icon area at top {%- endcomment -%}
{% render 'icon-service', icon_name: icon %}
{%- comment -%} Title {%- endcomment -%}

{{- title | escape -}}

{%- comment -%} Description {%- endcomment -%} {%- if description != blank -%}

{{- description | escape -}}

{%- endif -%} {%- comment -%} Price badge {%- endcomment -%} {%- if price != blank -%} {{- price | escape -}} {%- endif -%} {%- comment -%} Learn More CTA {%- endcomment -%} Learn More

{% comment %}
  Renders an inline SVG icon based on the icon_name variable.
  All icons are 40x40, use currentColor, and are minimal line-art style.

  Accepts:
  - icon_name: {String} The name of the icon to render.

  Supported icons:
  - document      : Auction Legal Pack (document/paper)
  - house-search  : RICS Survey (house with magnifying glass)
  - coins         : Outlays (stack of coins)
  - camera        : Photography (camera)
  - scroll        : Property Title (scroll/certificate)
  - arrow-up      : Rent Increase (upward arrow with pound sign)
  - handshake     : Tenancy Agreement (handshake)
  - megaphone     : Portal Boosting (megaphone)
  - check-circle  : Generic checkmark circle
  - star          : Star for ratings

  Usage:
  {% render 'icon-service', icon_name: 'document' %}
{% endcomment %}

{%- case icon_name -%}

  {%- when 'document' -%}
    {%- comment -%} Document / paper icon for Auction Legal Pack {%- endcomment -%}
    <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="40" height="40" viewBox="0 0 40 40" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true">
      <path d="M24 4H10a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v28a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h20a2 2 0 0 0 2-2V12L24 4z"/>
      <polyline points="24 4 24 12 32 12"/>
      <line x1="14" y1="18" x2="26" y2="18"/>
      <line x1="14" y1="23" x2="26" y2="23"/>
      <line x1="14" y1="28" x2="20" y2="28"/>
    </svg>

  {%- when 'house-search' -%}
    {%- comment -%} House with magnifying glass for RICS Survey {%- endcomment -%}
    <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="40" height="40" viewBox="0 0 40 40" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true">
      <path d="M5 18L20 5l15 13"/>
      <path d="M9 16v16h8v-10h6v10h8V16"/>
      <circle cx="30" cy="28" r="5"/>
      <line x1="33.5" y1="31.5" x2="37" y2="35"/>
    </svg>

  {%- when 'coins' -%}
    {%- comment -%} Stack of coins for Outlays {%- endcomment -%}
    <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="40" height="40" viewBox="0 0 40 40" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true">
      <ellipse cx="16" cy="12" rx="10" ry="4"/>
      <path d="M6 12v6c0 2.2 4.5 4 10 4s10-1.8 10-4v-6"/>
      <path d="M6 18v6c0 2.2 4.5 4 10 4s10-1.8 10-4v-6"/>
      <ellipse cx="26" cy="22" rx="8" ry="3"/>
      <path d="M18 22v5c0 1.7 3.6 3 8 3s8-1.3 8-3v-5"/>
      <path d="M18 27v5c0 1.7 3.6 3 8 3s8-1.3 8-3v-5"/>
    </svg>

  {%- when 'camera' -%}
    {%- comment -%} Camera icon for Photography {%- endcomment -%}
    <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="40" height="40" viewBox="0 0 40 40" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true">
      <path d="M4 13a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h4l3-4h14l3 4h4a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v18a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H6a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V13z"/>
      <circle cx="20" cy="22" r="7"/>
      <circle cx="20" cy="22" r="3"/>
    </svg>

  {%- when 'scroll' -%}
    {%- comment -%} Scroll / certificate for Property Title {%- endcomment -%}
    <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="40" height="40" viewBox="0 0 40 40" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true">
      <path d="M8 8a4 4 0 0 1 4-4h20v28H12a4 4 0 0 0-4 4V8z"/>
      <path d="M8 32a4 4 0 0 1 4-4h20v8H12a4 4 0 0 1-4-4z"/>
      <line x1="16" y1="12" x2="26" y2="12"/>
      <line x1="16" y1="17" x2="24" y2="17"/>
      <line x1="16" y1="22" x2="22" y2="22"/>
    </svg>

  {%- when 'arrow-up' -%}
    {%- comment -%} Upward arrow with pound sign for Rent Increase {%- endcomment -%}
    <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="40" height="40" viewBox="0 0 40 40" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true">
      <line x1="28" y1="32" x2="28" y2="10"/>
      <polyline points="22 16 28 10 34 16"/>
      <path d="M8 16c2-2 5-3 7-1s0 5-2 7H8"/>
      <line x1="6" y1="22" x2="18" y2="22"/>
      <line x1="8" y1="28" x2="17" y2="28"/>
    </svg>

  {%- when 'handshake' -%}
    {%- comment -%} Handshake for Tenancy Agreement {%- endcomment -%}
    <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="40" height="40" viewBox="0 0 40 40" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true">
      <path d="M4 16l8-6h5l3 3"/>
      <path d="M36 16l-8-6h-5l-3 3"/>
      <path d="M12 28l-8-6v-6"/>
      <path d="M28 28l8-6v-6"/>
      <path d="M15 25l5 5 7-7"/>
      <path d="M20 18l-5 5"/>
      <circle cx="20" cy="20" r="0.5" fill="currentColor"/>
    </svg>

  {%- when 'megaphone' -%}
    {%- comment -%} Megaphone for Portal Boosting {%- endcomment -%}
    <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="40" height="40" viewBox="0 0 40 40" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true">
      <path d="M32 8L12 16H6a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v4a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h6l20 8V8z"/>
      <path d="M12 24v8a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h2a2 2 0 0 0 2-2v-6"/>
      <line x1="36" y1="16" x2="38" y2="16"/>
      <line x1="36" y1="20" x2="38" y2="20"/>
      <line x1="36" y1="24" x2="38" y2="24"/>
    </svg>

  {%- when 'check-circle' -%}
    {%- comment -%} Checkmark circle - generic success/check {%- endcomment -%}
    <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="40" height="40" viewBox="0 0 40 40" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true">
      <circle cx="20" cy="20" r="16"/>
      <polyline points="13 20 18 25 27 15"/>
    </svg>

  {%- when 'star' -%}
    {%- comment -%} Star for ratings {%- endcomment -%}
    <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="40" height="40" viewBox="0 0 40 40" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true">
      <polygon points="20 4 24.5 14 36 15.5 27.5 23.5 29.5 35 20 29.5 10.5 35 12.5 23.5 4 15.5 15.5 14"/>
    </svg>

  {%- else -%}
    {%- comment -%} Fallback: simple circle placeholder {%- endcomment -%}
    <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="40" height="40" viewBox="0 0 40 40" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true">
      <circle cx="20" cy="20" r="16"/>
      <circle cx="20" cy="20" r="4"/>
    </svg>

{%- endcase -%}

content.text: All five files have been created. Let me verify they're all in place.

input.description: Verify all 5 files exist and show line counts

content.text:
All five files are created successfully (1,134 total lines). Here is a summary of each:

**FILE 1: `/assets/buy-property.js`** (272 lines)
- Scroll reveal with IntersectionObserver (threshold 0.1), handles elements already in viewport on load
- Header scroll effect: adds `.header--scrolled` past 50px, uses `requestAnimationFrame` throttling
- Hero toggle for selling/renting tabs with `.active` class management
- Smooth scroll for all `#` anchor links via delegated event listener
- Mobile bottom sheet cart with open/close/overlay/Escape key support, prevents background scroll
- Glass card parallax tilt on desktop mousemove (max 3 degrees), skipped on touch devices
- All wrapped in `DOMContentLoaded`, vanilla JS, commented sections

**FILE 2: `/snippets/card-service.liquid`** (65 lines)
- Accepts `card_title`, `card_description`, `card_price`, `card_icon`, `card_link`, `card_color_scheme`
- Renders a `.glass-card .card-service` anchor element (whole card clickable)
- Includes icon via `{% render 'icon-service' %}`, h3 title, description, price badge, and "Learn More" CTA with arrow
- Has `.reveal-on-scroll` class for animation integration

**FILE 3: `/snippets/icon-service.liquid`** (126 lines)
- Liquid `case` statement supporting all 10 icons: document, house-search, coins, camera, scroll, arrow-up, handshake, megaphone, check-circle, star
- All SVGs are 40x40, `currentColor` stroke, minimal line-art style
- Includes a fallback circle icon for unknown names

**FILE 4: `/templates/product.service.json`** (62 lines)
- JSON template with three sections: `main` (main-product), `process_timeline` (process-timeline), `related_services` (featured-collection)
- Configured for service products with stacked gallery layout, sticky info enabled

**FILE 5: `/sections/main-service-product.liquid`** (609 lines)
- Simplified service product section: no shipping/weight/3D model logic
- Block-based rendering: title, price, description, property_address_input, collapsible_tab, buy_buttons
- Property address captured as `properties[Property Address]` line item property (appears in orders)
- Collapsible accordions using native `<details>` elements
- "Important Information" notice above buy button about 24-hour contact
- Orange CTA button styling (#d4872e)
- Sticky mobile bottom CTA bar with price and "Book Now" button
- Full schema with presets that pre-populate "What's Included" and "Timescales" tabs
- Uses Shopify's `product-form` custom element and `{% form 'product' %}` for proper cart/checkout integration
